mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user (user_id, phone, password, real_name, role, status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{phone}, #{password}, #{realName}, #{role}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT account_balance FROM sys_user WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_user SET kyc_status = #{status}, user_real_name = #{realName} WHERE user_id = #{userId}
